scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.mobile:build: cd frontend && npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.mobile:add:android: cd frontend && npx cap add android
scripts.mobile:open: cd frontend && npx cap open android
scripts.mobile:run: cd frontend && npm run build && npx cap run android
